title: Fluffy Sour Dutch Banana Stir-fry
description: A festive dish featuring fluffy bananas cooked with a sour and high-protein-friendly sauce for a savory breakfast or snack option.
instructions: Peel and slice the bananas into thin strips.
In a small bowl, mix together soy sauce, vinegar, honey or agave syrup, and ground turmeric until well combined. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add banana slices to the skillet and stir-fry for about 5 minutes or until golden brown and slightly crispy on all sides.
If using peanut butter, add it to the pan with the sauce mixture and mix thoroughly to combine. Cook for another minute.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
